Jeanne's Potato Salads

author: Jeanne Marrs

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 2 lbs boiled, cooled, and cubed potatos
  • 1/4 c. celery
  • 1/4 c. onion
  • 1 green pepper
  • 2 tbs pimento, chopped
  • 3 hard boiled eggs
  • 2 chopped sweet pickles
  • 2 tbs sweet pickle juice
  • 1 c. mayonnaise
  • 2 tbs. vinegar

Directions

Combine all ingredients. Chill.
